'''hadhono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadjutrix|coadjutrix]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-dh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadjutrix|coadjutrix]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hadhono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hædheneth|hædheneth]] || [[word:hædhenej|hædhenej]] || [[word:hædhenesh|hædhenesh]] || [[word:hædhene|hædhene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadhodhonoth|hadhodhonoth]] || [[word:hadhodhonoj|hadhodhonoj]] || [[word:hadhodhonosh|hadhodhonosh]] || [[word:hadhodhono|hadhodhono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadhonoth|hadhonoth]] || [[word:hadhonoj|hadhonoj]] || [[word:hadhonosh|hadhonosh]] || [[word:hadhono|hadhono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadhofnoth|hadhofnoth]] || [[word:hadhofnoj|hadhofnoj]] || [[word:hadhofnosh|hadhofnosh]] || [[word:hadhofnof|hadhofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hadhonotho|hadhonotho]] || [[word:hadhonojo|hadhonojo]] || [[word:hadhonosho|hadhonosho]] || [[word:hadhonoko|hadhonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hadhonoth|hadhonoth]] || [[word:hadhonoj|hadhonoj]] || [[word:hadhonosh|hadhonosh]] || [[word:hadhono|hadhono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hadhonothol|hadhonothol]] || [[word:hadhonojol|hadhonojol]] || [[word:hadhonoshol|hadhonoshol]] || [[word:hadhonokol|hadhonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hadhonothotho|hadhonothotho]] || [[word:hadhonojojo|hadhonojojo]] || [[word:hadhonoshosho|hadhonoshosho]] || [[word:hadhonoko|hadhonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hadhonothon|hadhonothon]] || [[word:hadhonojon|hadhonojon]] || [[word:hadhonoshon|hadhonoshon]] || [[word:hadhonokon|hadhonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hadhonothoro|hadhonothoro]] || [[word:hadhonojoro|hadhonojoro]] || [[word:hadhonoshoro|hadhonoshoro]] || [[word:hadhonokoro|hadhonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
